name: Falla Suïssa - L'Alqueria del Favero
description: Traditional Valencian falla commission preserving UNESCO World Heritage cultural traditions in Valencia, Spain. Community organization founded in 2024 promoting Las Fallas festival, Valencian culture, gastronomy, and local heritage.
keywords: valencia, fallas, traditional culture, spain, unesco heritage, community organization, cultural preservation, festivals, valencian traditions
slogan: Preserving Valencian traditions through community and culture
award: UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity
culturalPolicy: Preservation and promotion of traditional Valencian culture and Las Fallas heritage

memberOf.name: Junta Central Fallera
memberOf.description: Central organization coordinating all Falla commissions in Valencia
